metadata.title: Gratis Woord- & Karakterteller – Kontroleer Tekslengte vir SEO
metadata.description: Tel woorde, karakters, paragrawe en leestyd onmiddellik. Kontroleer optimale tekslengte vir SEO – blogplasings, produkbladsye, bestemmingsbladsye. Geen registrasie nie.

hero.title: Woord- en karakterteller met lengte-evaluering
hero.description: Plak jou teks, kies 'n bladsytipe, en die instrument sal woordtelling, karaktertelling, paragrawe wys en evalueer of die lengte geskik is vir daardie tipe inhoud

software.name: Gratis woord- en karakterteller
software.description: Gratis woord- en karakterteller. Kontroleer woordtelling, karakters, paragrawe en beraamde leestyd. Evalueer tekslengte vir verskillende bladsytipes: produkbeskrywing, diensbladsy, tuisbladsy, bestemmingsbladsy, blogplasing, gids.
featureList: Aanbevole reekse vir: produkbeskrywing, diensbladsy, tuisbladsy, bestemmingsbladsy, blogplasing, gids

howTo.name: Hoe om die woord- en karakterteller te gebruik
howTo.description: Kontroleer die lengte van jou teks en evalueer of dit geskik is vir 'n spesifieke bladsytipe. Leer hoeveel woorde 'n produkbeskrywing, diensbladsy, blogplasing of gids moet hê.

steps.name: Kies 'n bladsytipe
steps.text: Kies uit die aftreklys waarvoor jy skryf. Elke tipe het verskillende aanbevole woordtellingreekse.

steps.name: Plak jou teks
steps.text: Plak of tik teks in die teksveld. Die instrument sal outomaties woorde, karakters (met en sonder spasies), paragrawe tel en leestyd beraam.

steps.name: Kontroleer die evaluering
steps.text: Kyk na die gekleurde vorderingsbalk en status. Groen beteken goeie lengte, geel beteken te kort, rooi beteken te lank.

steps.name: Kopieer die verslag
steps.text: Die Kopieer Verslag-knoppie kopieer 'n opsomming met alle statistieke en die lengte-evaluering na jou knipbord.

contentBlocks.title: Gratis woordteller - tel en evalueer tekslengte
contentBlocks.html:
Hierdie woordtellingsinstrument laat jou toe om vinnig die lengte van enige teks te kontroleer. Plak jou inhoud en die teller sal woorde, karakters en paragrawe tel. Jy sal ook sien hoeveel minute dit neem om te lees en of die lengte by die bladsytipe pas wat jy kies.

Elke bladsytipe het 'n ander doel - 'n produkbeskrywing beantwoord kopersvrae, 'n blogplasing dek 'n onderwerp in diepte, en 'n diensbladsy verduidelik wat die kliënt sal ontvang. Die teller wys reekse vir elk van hierdie tipes gebaseer op ontledings van inhoud wat goed rangeer.

contentBlocks.title: Hoe om die woord- en karakterteller te gebruik
contentBlocks.description: Die kontrolering van tekslengte neem minder as 'n minuut:

items.title: 1. Kies bladsytipe
items.description: Kies uit die aftreklys waarvoor jy skryf. Elke tipe het verskillende aanbevole minimum en maksimum woordtellings.

items.title: 2. Plak jou teks
items.description: Plak of tik teks in die groot veld aan die regterkant. Die instrument sal onmiddellik woorde, karakters (met en sonder spasies), paragrawe tel en leestyd beraam.

items.title: 3. Kontroleer die evaluering
items.description: Kyk na die gekleurde vorderingsbalk en status. Groen beteken goeie lengte, geel beteken te kort, rooi beteken te lank. Hieronder sal jy 'n nuttige wenk vind.

items.title: 4. Kopieer die verslag
items.description: Die Kopieer Verslag-knoppie kopieer 'n opsomming met woordtelling, karaktertelling, paragrawe, leestyd en lengte-evaluering na jou knipbord.

contentBlocks.title: Wat die teller meet - woorde, karakters, leestyd

items.title: Woorde
items.description: Totale woordtelling. Dit is die primêre aanwyser van tekslengte.

items.title: Karakters (met spasies)
items.description: Alle karakters insluitend spasies. Nuttig wanneer 'n CMS 'n karakterlimiet het (bv. markpleklyste).

items.title: Karakters (sonder spasies)
items.description: Slegs letters, syfers en leestekens. Soms vereis deur drukkerye of vir vertalingsfakturering.

items.title: Paragrawe
items.description: Hoeveel teksblokke geskei deur leë lyne jy het. Help om te beoordeel of die teks goed gestruktureer is.

items.title: Leestyd
items.description: Die leestydsakrekenaar wys hoeveel minute dit neem om die teks te lees teen 'n gemiddelde snelheid van 200 woorde per minuut.

contentBlocks.title: Hoe om die resultate te interpreteer
contentBlocks.subtitle: Evalueringsstatusse
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
Goeie lengteTeks is binne reeks
Onder reeksTeks is korter as tipies
Bo reeksTeks is langer as tipies
Vordering1200 / 1200–3000
contentBlocks.html:
Die gekleurde vorderingsbalk en status help jou om vinnig tekslengte te beoordeel:

  • Goeie lengte (groen) - die teks val binne die benaderde reeks vir die geselekteerde bladsytipe.
  • Onder reeks (geel) - die teks is korter as tipies vir hierdie bladsytipe. As dit al die leser se vrae beantwoord, kan die lengte goed wees.
  • Bo reeks (rooi) - die teks is langer as tipies. As elke paragraaf nuwe inligting byvoeg, is die lengte geregverdig.

Die reekse is gebaseer op ontledings van inhoud wat goed in soekenjins rangeer. As die teks die leser se vrae beantwoord, is die lengte toepaslik ongeag die tellerresultaat.

contentBlocks.title: How many words should a text have - optimal length for SEO
contentBlocks.html:
The ranges below are based on analyses of content that ranks well in search engines. Text length itself does not affect Google rankings - what matters is whether the content answers the reader's questions.

Page typeRangeWhen shorter, when longer?
Product description80–400 wordsSimple product (e.g., a mug) - 80–150 words. Complex equipment (e.g., a laptop) - 300–400 words, because buyers have more questions.
Service page500–1500 wordsLocal service (e.g., plumber) - 500–700 words. B2B service with process and FAQ - 1,200–1,500 words.
Homepage400–1000 wordsThe homepage conveys the main value and guides visitors further - the text supports navigation, not to replace subpages.
Landing page600–2500 wordsSimple offer - 600–1,000 words. Offer requiring explanation of process, variants, and objection handling - 1,500–2,500 words.
Blog post1200–3000 wordsAnswer to a simple question - 1,200–1,800 words. Complex topic with many aspects - 2,000–3,000 words.
Guide2500–6000 wordsNarrow topic - 2,500–3,500 words. Broad topic with many steps and examples - 4,000–6,000 words.

contentBlocks.title: Who is the online word counter for?
contentBlocks.description: A word counting tool for copywriters and beyond - here is who uses the counter most:

items.title: Copywriters and content creators
items.description: Check whether the text falls within the recommended range for a specific page type. The SEO word counter helps evaluate whether an article is developed enough.

items.title: Bloggers
items.description: Monitor post length to keep publications consistent. Check reading time before publishing.

items.title: E-commerce store owners
items.description: Verify product descriptions against character limits on selling platforms (Amazon, eBay, Etsy).

items.title: SEO specialists
items.description: Evaluate whether page content has an optimal length compared to competitors. Analyze the word-to-topic ratio.

items.title: Students and academics
items.description: Check whether a paper meets the required word or character limit.

items.title: Translators
items.description: Count characters without spaces for translation quotes (a standard billing unit).

contentBlocks.title: Character limits on popular platforms
contentBlocks.html:
The character counter is useful when creating content for platforms with length restrictions:

Platform / ElementCharacter limitNotes
Google - meta title50–60 charactersLonger titles are truncated in search results.
Google - meta description150–160 charactersThe description visible below the link in search results.
Amazon - product title200 charactersShort, specific title with the most important keywords.
Amazon - bullet points500 characters eachUp to 5 bullet points describing key product features.
X (Twitter) - post280 charactersStandard limit for regular users.
LinkedIn - post3,000 charactersAfter ~210 characters a "see more" link appears.

contentBlocks.title: What makes this word and character counter special?

items.title: Six page types with recommended ranges
items.description: Product description, service page, homepage, landing page, blog post, and guide - each type has its own ranges based on analyses.

items.title: Local processing in the browser
items.description: Your text is never sent to any server - all analysis happens locally on your device.

items.title: Text length evaluation
items.description: You don't just count words - you get information on whether the length is appropriate for the selected page type.

items.title: SEO-based ranges
items.description: Recommended lengths are based on analyses of content that ranks well in search engines.

items.title: Reading time
items.description: You immediately know how many minutes it will take readers to go through the text.

items.title: Copy report
items.description: The Copy Report button copies a summary with all statistics and the length evaluation to your clipboard.

contentBlocks.title: Frequently asked questions about the word and character counter

items.question: Does text length affect Google rankings?
items.answer: Text length by itself is not a ranking factor. Google evaluates whether the content answers the user's question and is valuable to them. Shorter text that comprehensively answers a question can rank well - what matters is value for the reader. The ranges in this tool are based on analyses of content that ranks well in search results.
items.answerSchemaText: Text length is not a direct ranking factor. Google evaluates the value of content for the user.

items.question: Why are the word ranges so broad?
items.answer: The same page type may require different lengths depending on topic complexity. A simple product description (e.g., a mug) is 80–150 words - just material, capacity, and use case. A laptop description is 300–400 words because buyers ask about the processor, memory, screen, and battery. Similarly with services: a local plumber's page is 500–700 words, while a comprehensive B2B service implementation page with process steps and FAQ is 1,200–1,500 words.
items.answerSchemaText: The difference comes from topic complexity - a simple product needs fewer words than a complex one.

items.question: How should I interpret "too short" or "too long"?
items.answer: The evaluation shows where your text falls relative to typical content of that type. If the text is marked "too short" but answers all of the reader's questions - the length is fine. If it is "too long" but every paragraph adds new information - the length is justified.
items.answerSchemaText: The evaluation shows where the text falls relative to typical content. If the text answers the reader's questions, the length is appropriate.

items.question: How does the reading time calculator work?
items.answer: The tool divides the word count by 200 - the average reading speed for typical text. Technical or demanding text (e.g., documentation, terms of service) will be read slower. A light lifestyle article - faster. The result is an approximate value that helps estimate how long a reader will spend with the text.
items.answerSchemaText: The tool assumes an average reading speed of 200 words per minute. This is an approximate value for typical text.

items.question: Where do the recommended ranges come from?
items.answer: The ranges are based on analyses of content that ranks well in search engines and on content creation best practices. They are intentionally broad because the same page type may require different lengths depending on industry, topic complexity, and reader needs. The ranges serve as a starting point for evaluating whether text falls within a typical range for a specific page type.
items.answerSchemaText: The ranges are based on SEO analyses and content creation best practices.

items.question: Can I copy the report with statistics?
items.answer: Yes. Below the statistics you will find a Copy Report button - it copies a summary with word count, character count, paragraphs, reading time, and length evaluation to your clipboard. You can paste it into a document or send it to collaborators.
items.answerSchemaText: Yes. Click the Copy Report button below the statistics. A summary with all metrics and evaluation will be copied to your clipboard.
